context: The user has submitted a C++ pull request containing multiple potential memory leaks.

empathic_chain.observation: The user frequently experiences tense confusion when using subordinate clauses.
empathic_chain.feeling: I detect their anxiety and deep sense of frustration.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs to quickly understand core concepts and build technical confidence.
empathic_chain.request: Empathize with their stress first, then guide them to sort out the highest priority tasks currently.

output_format: Empathic response -> Issue breakdown -> Action plan
